injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: Doubtful for tournament opener; assessment ongoing in Sarasota camp

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Withdrawn in the 36th minute after his ankle locked; had been carrying the issue for some time

injuryUpdates.notes: First-choice midfield starter in Popovic's last seven matches. Popovic publicly admitted uncertainty over severity. Tracked as a major doubt given how central he is to the midfield plan.

injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: Will not return before MLS pause on 2026-05-23; tournament squad place in serious doubt

lastMatchPlayed.opponent: Tigres UANL (CONCACAF Champions Cup semi-final, withdrew in warm-up)
lastMatchPlayed.notes: Suffered the quad injury during warm-ups and was seen returning on crutches

injuryUpdates.source: football360.com.au, sixonefivesoccer.com, ESPN Injury Tracker - May 2026
injuryUpdates.notes: Was pushing for a place in the 26-man squad with nine caps. Nashville coach BJ Callaghan confirmed the injury keeps him out through the league's tournament break.

injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: Available; building up minutes in Sarasota pre-camp

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Played 88 minutes in a 1-0 win for Leicester, clean sheet, FotMob rating 8.0

injuryUpdates.notes: First competitive appearance in 483 days came on 2026-04-24 vs Millwall (scored, man of the match). Called into Sarasota pre-camp on initial eight-player list; Popovic publicly flagged him as a fitness assessment case. Material upgrade on bundled profile, which had him as a long-term concern.

injuryUpdates.expectedReturn: Available; fitness being assessed in Sarasota pre-camp

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Only four appearances and one start since November injury before being called into pre-camp

injuryUpdates.notes: Surprise inclusion in the initial Sarasota train-on group. Popovic explicitly grouped him with Souttar as a fitness-watch case. First Socceroos involvement since June 2024.

squadChanges.details: Uncapped QPR midfielder added to the Sarasota pre-camp train-on squad as part of the second wave of ten arrivals, given a late chance to push for the 26-man squad.
Uncapped Wigan/Coventry forward added to the Sarasota pre-camp train-on squad in the second wave of ten arrivals, alongside fellow uncapped player Daniel Bennie.
First Socceroos call-up since November 2024 after completing his Achilles rehab and returning to two Leicester matches at the end of the Championship season.
First Socceroos involvement since the June 2024 qualifier vs Palestine; recalled to the initial eight-player Sarasota pre-camp group despite limited A-League minutes post hip surgery.

bettingOddsUpdate.toQualifyFromGroup: +900 to win Group D (USA -130 favourites; Türkiye +175, Paraguay +350)
bettingOddsUpdate.notes: Outright tournament price ~+50000 (around 0.2% implied). Aggregators report group exit as roughly a coin-flip versus advancing; explicit head-to-head exit price was not surfaced from a primary bookmaker.

summary: Australia's biggest deltas since 2026-04-16 are two fresh midfield injury scares — Aiden O'Neill (ankle, NYCFC, 3 May) and Patrick Yazbek (quad, Nashville, 29 April) — both now major doubts as the squad assembles in Sarasota. The pre-camp itself is notable: Popovic recalled Harry Souttar (first Socceroos involvement since Nov 2024, two successful Leicester returns) and veteran Mathew Leckie as fitness-assessment cases, and added uncapped duo Daniel Bennie and Raphael Borges Rodrigues to a second wave of arrivals. Coach unchanged, tactical 3-4-2-1 unchanged, no new internationals played yet (Mexico friendly is 30 May).
